SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: NPI 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
10 
SOURCE: 
PDE and HCIdea™ Prescriber Database 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This variable was new in 2014; beginning with 2014 Part D Prescriber Characteristics file, the NPI is 
used in place of the CCW_PRSCRBR_ID. The CCW_PRSCRBR_ID was retired after 2013.
